# MCP Server Setup Instructions

This repository now includes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implemented in TypeScript. The server uses the official
[@modelcontextprotocol/sdk](https://npm.im/@modelcontextprotocol/sdk) package.

- **SDK documentation**: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/
- **TypeScript SDK repo**: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk

If you add or modify the server, please refer to the SDK docs for examples and API details.  You can also browse the
`docs` folder of the SDK repo (`docs/server.md`, `docs/capabilities.md`, etc.) for usage patterns and quick‑start
snippets.

The MCP server configuration for VS Code is defined in `.vscode/mcp.json`.  Use the name `playwright-mcp` when
running or debugging the server from the editor.
